name: catalog-authority
description: Phase 1 — event-sourced catalog authority core. No providers, HTTP, adapters, or Hermes.

scripts.test: tsx test/config.ts && tsx test/custodian-contract.ts && tsx test/custodian-guard.ts && tsx test/kek-rewrap.ts && tsx test/backup-verify.ts && tsx test/deploy.ts && tsx test/crypto.ts && tsx test/run.ts 5433 && tsx test/phase2.ts 5434 && tsx test/shred.ts 5435 && tsx test/reconcile.ts 5436 && tsx test/integration.ts 5437 && tsx test/backup.ts 5438 && tsx test/backup-ops.ts 5439 && tsx test/ops-doctor.ts 5440 && tsx test/ops-init.ts 5441 && tsx test/ops-golden-path.ts 5442 && tsx test/schema-version.ts 5443
scripts.smoke:compose: docker compose -f docker-compose.deploy.yml run --rm ops ops:migrate
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run test
